ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Gelati in 1642. Benigni`s volume of `Poesie` appeared in Macerata in 1667. See the PhD thesis on line, Robert Rau Holzer, `Music and Poetry in Seventeenth-Century Rome`. Enrica Donisi, `Domenico Benigni, le sue poesie, la musica e le Accademie degli Umoristi e dei Gelati nella Roma del Primo Seicento`. Censor among the Umoristi in 1638
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
